facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 2,947 reviews. At a beachfront restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Mai Hương Beachfront sits right on the Grand World waterfront at Quãng Trường Biển, and the numbers don't lie. Nearly 3,000 people rated it almost perfectly. That doesn't happen by accident.

Add this to your Phu Quoc restaurant list before the crowds catch on.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Waves behind you. Food in front of you. 4.9 stars from 2,947 people at Mai Hương Beachfront, Grand World Phu Quoc. This is what the waterfront dining scene actually looks like here.
